channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Saquon Barkley sets Eagles season rushing record and has Dickerson's NFL mark in his sights
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Saquon Barkley knew the Eagles season rushing record could be his on Sunday with the type of stellar performance that has become the standard during his first season in Philadelphia.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Alabama left out of playoff as committee rewards SMU's wins over Crimson Tide's strong schedule
item.description: The College Football Playoff committee took SMU's wins over Alabama's strength of schedule, picking the Mustangs for the final at-large spot Sunday after a furious public debate and days of lobbying and arguing over which teams should make the 12-team field.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Tua Tagovailoa's TD pass to Jonnu Smith gives Dolphins 32-26 overtime win over Aaron Rodgers, Jets
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Tua Tagovailoa threw a 10-yard touchdown pass to Jonnu Smith in overtime and the Miami Dolphins overcame Aaron Rodgers' first 300-yard passing game in nearly three years to beat the New York Jets 32-26 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: BYU to play Colorado in Alamo Bowl December 28
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU football team will be taking on a fellow Big 12 team in a bowl game this season. #17 BYU and #23 Colorado both accepted invitations to play in the Alama Bowl December 28th in San Antonio. The game will be televised on ABC4 at 5:30 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Baker Mayfield throws for 3 TDs, Bucs take over 1st in NFC South with 28-13 win over Raiders
item.description: Baker Mayfield threw for 295 yards and three touchdowns, helping the Tampa Bay Buccaneers beat the Las Vegas Raiders 28-13 and take over sole possession of first place in the NFC South on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: LSU, Baylor to play in Kinder’s Texas Bowl at NRG Stadium
item.description: LSU and Baylor have accepted bids to play in the 2024 Kinder’s Texas Bowl, the bowl organizing committee announced Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Christian Terry, KPRC 2

item.title: Tamar Bates scores 29 points to help Missouri beat No. 1 Kansas 76-67
item.description: Tamar Bates had 29 points and five steals to help Missouri beat Hunter Dickinson and No. 1 Kansas 76-67.
item.dc:creator: David Solomon, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 49ers-Bears pregame: Hufanga, Ward, Lenoir bolster secondary
item.description: The 49ers (5-7) will have a full-staff secondary today with the return of safety Talanoa Hufanga and starting cornerbacks Charvarius Ward and Deommodore Lenoir.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: College Football Playoff field set: SMU’s in, Alabama’s out and there could be consequences
item.description: The Crimson Tide was excluded from the inaugural 12-team College Football Playoff, with SMU getting the final at-large spot.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Chelsea rallies for a wild win at Tottenham but Arsenal stumbles in Premier League title race
item.description: Don’t listen to Enzo Maresca. Chelsea really is a Premier League challenger this season. In a wild London derby, Chelsea conceded twice in the opening 11 minutes before recovering brilliantly for a 4-3 win at Tottenham to move four points behind Liverpool on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lindsey Vonn is encouraged by how close she is to being competitive in ski racing return at age 40
item.description: COPPER MOUNTAIN, Colo. (AP) — Lindsey Vonn is still getting her ski equipment dialed in and getting used to going full speed again on her new titanium knee.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: First 12-team College Football Playoff set, Oregon seeded No. 1 and SMU edges Alabama for last spot
item.description: The tournament starts Dec. 20-21 with four first-round games involving teams seeded 5-12. It concludes Jan. 20 with the national title game in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utes QB Isaac Wilson enters transfer portal
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utes freshman quarterback Isaac Wilson announced on Sunday that he is entering the transfer portal after one season. Wilson threw for 1,510 yards and 10 touchdowns as a freshman, starting seven games in place of injured starter Cam Rising.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lando Norris wins season-ending Abu Dhabi Grand Prix to seal constructors' title for McLaren
item.description: ABU DHABI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — Lando Norris ended McLaren's 26-year wait for the Formula 1 constructors' title as he won the season-ending Abu Dhabi Grand Prix on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Steelers WR George Pickens to miss first game of his career with hamstring injury
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Pittsburgh Steelers wide receiver George Pickens will have to wait to “introduce” himself to Cleveland Browns defensive back Greg Newsome II.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Why did the SF Giants add Willy Adames? A deep dive into the numbers
item.description: Adames has never been an All-Star, Gold Glover or Silver Slugger, but the 29-year-old has long been one of the best shortstops in baseball
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Alabama AD makes case for Crimson Tide to get into College Football Playoff
item.description: Alabama athletics director Greg Byrne makes a case for the Crimson Tide to make the College Football Playoff despite not winning a conference championship and having three losses.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No. 5 Georgia pulls off another overtime stunner, beating No. 2 Texas 22-19 for SEC title
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The Georgia Bulldogs were struggling to get anything going against Texas, and there was little reason to be hopeful of a turnaround with their quarterback crumpled on the turf. Enter a guy who had barely played in his college career.
item.dc:creator: PAUL NEWBERRY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Arizona State makes College Football Playoff with 45-19 win over Iowa State in Big 12 title game
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Cam Skattebo and Arizona State are on quite a run in their Big 12 debut after being the preseason pick to finish at the bottom of the conference.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Baltimore Orioles reach $49.5M, 3-year deal with OF Tyler O'Neill, AP source says
item.description: The Baltimore Orioles have agreed to a $49.5 million, three-year contract with outfielder Tyler O'Neill, according to a person familiar with the negotiations. The person spoke to The Associated Press on Saturday on condition of anonymity because the agreement was subject to a successful physical.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wizards overcome career-high 56 by Jokic, snap 16-game skid with 122-113 win over the Nuggets
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Jordan Poole scored 39 points, and the Washington Wizards overcame a career-high 56 by Nikola Jokic to beat the Denver Nuggets 122-113 on Saturday night and snap their 16-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Arizona State coach Kenny Dillingham sends clear message to playoff selection committee after winning Big 12
item.description: The 12-team College Football Playoff requires the top four seeds be conference champs. But Mountain West winner Boise State could keep ASU out of one of those coveted spots.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: LA Galaxy hold off New York Red Bulls to win their record 6th MLS Cup championship
item.description: Joseph Paintsil and Dejan Joveljic scored in the first half, and the LA Galaxy won their record sixth MLS Cup championship with a 2-1 victory over the New York Red Bulls on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: George Pickens fined over $20,000 after criticisms about behavior from head coach: report
item.description: Just days after Mike Tomlin said George Pickens needs to "grow up," the star receiver was reportedly hit with over $20,000 in fines from unsportsmanlike conduct penalties.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utes sweep College of Charleston in NCAA Tournament
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah's incredible turnaround season isn't done yet. After going 11-19 in 2023, the Utes Volleyball team has advanced to the second round of the NCAA Tournament after a three-set sweep over the College of Charleston Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hagel scores 2, Point has 4 assists in Lightning's 8-1 win over Sharks
item.description: Brayden Point had four assists and Brandon Hagel scored twice to lead the Tampa Bay Lightning to an 8-1 victory against the San Jose Sharks. Jake Guentzel, Conor Geekie and Cam Atkinson each scored a goal and assist. Anthony Cirelli, Nick Perbix and Nicholas Paul scored the Lightning’s other goals.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: BYU loses in first round of NCAA Tournament
item.description: WEST LAFAYETTE, Ind. — The BYU women's volleyball team was making its 13th consecutive appearance in the NCAA Tournament. But for the first time since 2005, the Cougars are going home after losing in the first round.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Manny Pacquiao, winner of titles in a record 8 weight classes, elected to Boxing Hall of Fame
item.description: (AP) -- Manny Pacquiao, who won titles in a record eight weight classes from flyweight to super welterweight while becoming one of boxing's biggest draws, was elected Thursday to the International Boxing Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Utes bring in 21 players on early signing day
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With the future of head coach Kyle Whittingham still up in the air, and the search for a new offensive coordinator ongoing, the Utes football program inked 19 new players on National Signing Day Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Illinois Football assistant coach dies at age 62
item.description: CHAMPAIGN, Ill. (WCIA) -- Dana Dimel, the Senior Offensive Assistant for the Illinois Fighting Illini football team, has died. Illinois Athletics announced that the longtime coach passed away Tuesday at the age of 62. He is survived by his wife Julie and their children Winston and Joey.
item.dc:creator: Bradley Zimmerman, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC falls at home to Dallas, 2-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Casey DeSmith made 34 saves for the Dallas Stars, who held on to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 2-1 at Delta Center on Monday. It was DeSmith's first win since Oct. 24.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU runners use olive oil to win NCAA championship
item.description: The school's coach said his runners used “an old-school running trick” by rubbing olive oil on their legs to keep themselves warm.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: Trent Williams' wife annouces passing of newborn son
item.description: (KRON) -- San Francisco 49ers star left tackle Trent Williams' newborn son passed away last week, his wife Sondra announced on Instagram. Trenton O'Brien Williams Jr. died on the night of Nov. 24. Trenton was born prematurely as Sondra gave birth to her son after 35 weeks of pregnancy.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4
